Ref: 
Regulation 30 (2) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015 
 
Dear Sir/ Madam, 
 
This is to inform you that pursuant to the captioned regulation an analyst/Investors Conference 
Call has been scheduled as under: 
 
Date of Conference Call 
Time 
Wednesday, August 12, 2020 
1:00 P.M. 
  
Please find enclosed the Dial in details for the aforesaid conference call. The information is also 
hosted on the website of the Company at www.galaxysurfactants.com. 
 
We request you to take the same on record. 
Yours faithfully, 
For Galaxy Surfactants Limited 
 
 
Niranjan Ketkar 
Company Secretary 
M. No. A20002 
Encl.: as above 
 
NIRANJAN 
ARUN KETKAR
